findings.issue: Conditional source without fallback logging - log_start/log_end undefined if _log-helper missing
findings.recommendation: Define no-op functions when _log-helper is missing, or make the source mandatory with a clear error message

findings.issue: Token extraction error handling masks failures - 2>/dev/null masks all errors
findings.recommendation: Capture stderr from the secret command and include it in the warning message

findings.issue: Temp files trap uses single quotes - cleanup could fail if paths contain special characters
findings.recommendation: Use double quotes in the trap for variable expansion

findings.issue: Literal \n in variable assignment creates backslash-n, not newline

findings.recommendation: Support GH_SECRET_NAME environment variable for custom secret names
